[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1010001 3
1 0111111 6
2 1111111 a
3 1011111 6
4 1110011 5
5 1101111 6
6 1111010 5
7 1011111 6

67 76 1111101 6
70 07 1110101 5

47 74 1110100 4

61 16 1101101 5
